ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE  ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HECTOR WOLANSKY, AND, LORRAINE THIEBAUD MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFENDANTS FAILED TO GIVE NOTICE, PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.3. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. DEFENDANTS WERE PROPERLY SERVED AND AWARE OF THE LAWSUIT, AND THEIR FAILURE TO PROPERLY RESPOND IS NOT EXCUSABLE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Relief From Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS HECTOR WOLANSKY, and, LORRAINE THIEBAUD Motion for Relief from Default and Default Judgment. Appearances: Robert D. Resner, Esq. Attorney at Law, specially appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Defendants Hector Wolansky, and Lorraine Thiebaud, in Pro Per defendants and moving party, appearing. Defendants failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. Defendants fail to demonstrate mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. Defendants were properly served and aware of the lawsuit, and their failure to properly respond is not excusable. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
